stemHtml: Frise ailerons are used to reduce adverse aileron yaw. To achieve this the...

options.a: up-going aileron moves through a larger angle than the down-going aileron.
options.b: down-going aileron moves through a larger angle than the up-going aileron.
options.c: leading edge of the up-going aileron protrudes below the lower surface of the wing, causing more drag.
options.d: leading edge of the down-going aileron protrudes above the upper surface of the wing, causing more drag.
